data.body:
## Description

Replace the review-protocol SKILL.md content with a thin wrapper that reads and executes REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md. Follow the same pattern as plugins/dso/commands/review.md wrapping REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md.

The skill keeps its YAML frontmatter (name, description, user-invocable) and adds a brief instruction block that tells Claude to:
1. Read REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md
2. Execute every step in order

This preserves direct /dso:review-protocol invocation for callers at nesting depth <= 2 while allowing implementation-plan (Story 0f9d-5e21) to read the workflow doc inline.

## TDD Requirement

Verify existing review-protocol tests still pass. The skill should produce identical behavior — callers see no change.

## Files to modify

- plugins/dso/skills/review-protocol/SKILL.md (EDIT — replace body with thin wrapper)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] review-protocol SKILL.md is a thin wrapper (< 20 lines after frontmatter)
  Verify: awk '/^---$/{n++; if(n==2) start=NR} start && NR>start' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/review-protocol/SKILL.md | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 > 20)}'
- [ ] SKILL.md references REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md
  Verify: grep -q "REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/review-protocol/SKILL.md
- [ ] Existing review-protocol tests pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh 2>&1 | grep "PASSED:"
